Subject: Unable to access dashboard after update
Description:
After the latest update, users are reporting they cannot access the main dashboard. Error message: 'Session expired'. This is affecting multiple users across the organization.

Steps to reproduce:
1. Log in to the application
2. Navigate to Dashboard
3. See 'Session expired' error

Expected: Dashboard loads normally
Actual: Session expired error displayed

Subject: Feature request: Export to PDF
Description:
We would like the ability to export reports to PDF format for offline viewing and sharing with stakeholders who don't have system access.

Business justification:
- Monthly board meetings require printed reports
- Auditors request static snapshots
- Offline access needed during travel

Subject: Integration sync failing with HIPAA-compliant systems
Description: Our integration with Epic Systems via HL7 FHIR endpoints has been failing consistently for the past 3 days with no successful data transfer. We're seeing connection timeout errors and certificate validation failures when attempting to sync patient records. The FHIR R4 endpoint at fhir.healthfirst.example.com/api/v4/Patient is returning TLS handshake failures. This is a HIPAA-compliant system and the data sync interruption is affecting patient care coordination across 3 regional facilities. We need immediate resolution as this impacts our compliance reporting deadlines.

Subject: Performance degradation on report generation
Description:
Report generation that used to take 30 seconds is now taking 5+ minutes. This started approximately 2 weeks ago.

Affected reports:
- Monthly Sales Summary
- Inventory Analytics
- Customer Insights Dashboard

No configuration changes made on our end.

Subject: SSO configuration not working with Azure AD
Description:
We're trying to configure Single Sign-On with our Azure Active Directory but getting authentication errors.

Setup:
- Azure AD Premium P2
- SAML 2.0 configuration
- Error: AADSTS50011 - Reply URL mismatch

We've followed the documentation but can't get past this error.

Subject: License activation issue for new users
Description:
We purchased 50 additional licenses last week but only 30 are showing in our admin console. Need the remaining 20 licenses activated.

Order number: ORD-2024-0125
Purchase date: 2024-01-18
Licenses ordered: 50
Licenses visible: 30

Subject: API rate limiting questions
Description:
We need clarification on API rate limits for our integration project:

1. What are the daily/hourly request limits?
2. Are there different limits for different endpoints?
3. How do we request limit increases for enterprise usage?
4. Is there a way to monitor our current usage?

Subject: Data migration assistance needed
Description:
We're planning to migrate from our legacy system to your platform. Need assistance with:

1. Data format requirements
2. Migration timeline estimation
3. Rollback procedures
4. Testing strategy

Data volume: ~5TB across 50 million records

Subject: API authentication tokens expiring too quickly
Description: Our API tokens are expiring after 1 hour instead of the configured 24 hours. This is causing frequent re-authentication and disrupting automated workflows.

Subject: Billing discrepancy on January invoice
Description: Our January invoice shows charges for 150 seats but we only have 120 active users. Please review and issue a credit for the 30 extra seats.

Subject: Webhook delivery failures to our endpoint
Description: Webhook events are not being delivered to our configured endpoint. We see events queued in the dashboard but they never arrive. Our endpoint is healthy and accepting connections.

Subject: Two-factor authentication not sending SMS codes
Description: Users are not receiving SMS verification codes when enabling 2FA. The codes work via email but SMS delivery is failing for all mobile carriers.

Subject: Slow dashboard load time in European region
Description: Users in our EU offices experience 8-12 second load times for the main dashboard. US users load in under 2 seconds. We are hosted in the EU-West region.

Subject: Custom role permissions not saving correctly
Description: When creating custom roles with specific permission sets, the settings revert to defaults after saving. This affects our RBAC implementation across 5 departments.

Subject: Data export job stuck in processing state
Description: A large data export job submitted 48 hours ago is still showing 'Processing' status. No error message displayed. The export is critical for our monthly compliance report.

Subject: Onboarding new team members - license assignment
Description: Need guidance on how to bulk-assign licenses to 25 new employees starting next Monday. Looking for the most efficient process.

Subject: Integration with Salesforce not syncing opportunities
Description: The Salesforce connector is not pulling opportunity updates. Contact and account syncs work fine but opportunity sync has been broken since the connector update last week.

Subject: Mobile app crashing on Android 14 devices
Description: Users on Android 14 devices are experiencing consistent app crashes when opening the reports section. Issue does not occur on Android 13 or iOS devices.

Subject: Request for SCIM provisioning documentation
Description: We are setting up automated user provisioning via SCIM 2.0 and need detailed documentation on the supported attributes and mapping configuration.

Subject: Scheduled reports not sending to email recipients
Description: Scheduled report emails stopped being delivered 5 days ago. Reports run successfully (shown in history) but no emails arrive. SPF and DKIM records are correctly configured.

Subject: SSO redirect loop after session timeout
Description: After session timeout, users are caught in a redirect loop between the application and the IdP. Clearing cookies resolves it temporarily but the issue recurs on next timeout.

Subject: Data retention policy configuration question
Description: We need to configure data retention policies to comply with GDPR Article 17 requirements. Specifically, how to set up automatic deletion of inactive user data after 2 years.

Subject: Performance issue with search across large datasets
Description: Full-text search across our 2M+ record database is timing out. Searches that return more than 1000 results take 30+ seconds. This is blocking our customer service team.

Subject: Audit log missing entries for admin actions
Description: Our audit log is not recording some administrative actions including bulk user deletions and permission changes. This is a compliance requirement for our SOC 2 audit.

Subject: API endpoint returning 500 errors intermittently
Description: The /api/v2/reports/generate endpoint returns 500 Internal Server Error approximately 20% of the time. No pattern in timing or user. Error logs show null pointer exceptions.

Subject: How to configure IP allowlisting for API access
Description: We want to restrict API access to specific IP ranges for security compliance. Please provide documentation on configuring IP allowlisting for our organization.

Subject: Bulk user import failing with CSV validation errors
Description: Attempting to import 500 users via CSV is failing at row 247 with validation error 'Invalid email format'. All emails are valid RFC 5322 compliant. File uses UTF-8 encoding.

Subject: Notification center not showing real-time alerts
Description: The in-app notification center has a 15-20 minute delay on alerts that should be real-time. This is causing our operations team to miss critical system alerts.

Subject: Request upgrade to Enterprise tier
Description: We've grown to 800 users and need to upgrade from Business to Enterprise tier. Please initiate the upgrade process and provide updated pricing.

Subject: Database connector losing connection after idle period
Description: The database integration connector disconnects after approximately 30 minutes of inactivity. Auto-reconnect is enabled but fails silently, requiring a manual restart of the integration service.

Subject: Multi-tenant data isolation verification request
Description: As part of our annual security audit, we need documentation confirming data isolation between tenants in your multi-tenant architecture. Can you provide a SOC 2 Type II report?

Subject: Report filters not persisting between sessions
Description: Custom report filters that users save are not persisting between login sessions. Users must reconfigure filters every time they log in, which is significantly impacting productivity.

Subject: LDAP group sync not including nested groups
Description: LDAP synchronization correctly imports top-level groups but does not include members of nested subgroups. We have a deep hierarchy with 4 levels of nesting that should all be synced.

Subject: CDN caching stale content after deployment
Description: After each deployment, our CDN continues serving stale static assets for up to 4 hours. Cache invalidation is configured but not triggering properly on deployment events.

Subject: Training request for new admin users
Description: We have 3 new system administrators starting next month and would like to schedule platform training sessions. Please advise on available training options and pricing.

Subject: OAuth 2.0 PKCE flow not working with mobile app
Description: Our mobile application using OAuth 2.0 with PKCE cannot complete the authorization flow. The token exchange is failing with 'invalid_grant' error despite correct implementation per RFC 7636.

Subject: Excessive memory usage causing application crashes
Description: The application is consuming over 8GB of RAM when running standard operations and crashing after 6-8 hours of use. Memory profiling shows a leak in the session management module.

Subject: Timezone conversion errors in scheduled tasks
Description: Scheduled tasks are running at incorrect times after daylight saving time changes. Tasks configured for 9 AM EST are running at 8 AM or 10 AM depending on the server region.

Subject: File upload size limit needs increasing
Description: Our current plan allows 100MB file uploads but we regularly need to upload data files of 500MB-1GB for analytics processing. Please advise on plan upgrades or configuration options.

Subject: Cross-site scripting vulnerability in comment field
Description: Our security team identified a potential XSS vulnerability in the ticket comment field. HTML tags are not being sanitized before rendering, allowing script injection via comment text.

Subject: Data pipeline failing during high-volume ingestion
Description: Our data ingestion pipeline fails when processing more than 10,000 events per second. The pipeline drops events without logging errors, resulting in data loss that is only detectable via record count reconciliation.

Subject: Unable to disable deprecated TLS 1.0 connections
Description: Security policy requires disabling TLS 1.0 but the platform settings do not provide an option to enforce minimum TLS version. This is blocking our PCI DSS compliance.

Subject: Email template variables not rendering in some locales
Description: Email templates with localized content fail to render template variables ({{first_name}}, {{account_name}}) for users in Japanese and Chinese locales. English and European locales work correctly.

Subject: Kubernetes operator crashing on pod eviction events
Description: Our deployment of the platform Kubernetes operator is crashing when node resource pressure causes pod evictions. The crash loop is affecting cluster stability.

Subject: Compliance report generation taking over 2 hours
Description: Generating our quarterly SOX compliance report has gone from 20 minutes to over 2 hours. The report queries 18 months of audit log data. No schema changes have been made.

Subject: Incorrect user count in organization dashboard
Description: The organization dashboard shows 342 active users but our license count shows 287 active licenses. Need to understand the discrepancy and ensure billing accuracy.

Subject: GraphQL subscription connection dropping frequently
Description: GraphQL subscriptions are disconnecting every 2-3 minutes requiring the client to re-subscribe. This is affecting real-time features including live dashboards and collaboration tools.

Subject: Feature request: bulk archive for resolved tickets
Description: We accumulate hundreds of resolved tickets monthly and need a way to bulk archive them. Currently we can only archive one at a time which is very time-consuming for our support team.

Subject: Password complexity requirements not enforcing correctly
Description: The password policy requires special characters but users are successfully setting passwords without them. Policy shows as active in admin settings. This is a security gap we need closed immediately.

Subject: Terraform provider failing to import existing resources
Description: The official Terraform provider for our platform cannot import pre-existing resources using 'terraform import'. The import command succeeds but the state file is populated with empty attributes.
